nasb.text: “When you enter the land of Canaan, which I give you for a possession, and I put a mark of leprosy on a house in the land of your possession,

esv.text: “When you come into the land of Canaan, which I give you for a possession, and I put a case of leprous disease in a house in the land of your possession,

cnv.text: “你們進了我賜給你們作產業的迦南地的時候，我給你們作產業之地的房屋，如果發霉，

ccb.text: “你们到了我赐给你们作产业的迦南以后，如果我使那里的房屋中有发霉现象，
